message:
chore(beads): update issue tracker with new audit issues

Added five new audit/task tracking entries from ongoing deep
correctness audit campaign:
- bd-1wfir: clippy significant_drop_tightening cleanup in
  conformance/logging.rs (in_progress, assigned to Codex)
- bd-21ynj: runtime/spawn_blocking.rs deep correctness audit
  (closed, completed)
- bd-2k6g1: plan/analysis.rs deep correctness audit
  (in_progress, assigned to SapphireHill)
- bd-34tzm: fs io-uring path handling non-UTF8 Unix path bug
  (in_progress, assigned to SilverValley)
- bd-e1fij: combinator/select.rs deep correctness audit (open)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
